overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit downtown district. The character proceeds along sidewalks lined with palm trees and glass skyscrapers featuring glowing cyan pedestrian bridges, passing various pedestrians and crossing city streets in a vibrant cyberpunk metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with elevated glass pedestrian walkways

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath neon-lit pedestrian bridges, observing the street activity and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated glass walkway with glowing cyan neon trim connecting skyscrapers overhead
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street in planters
smooth beige building facade with large digital billboards displaying advertisements
tall glass and steel tower with reflective windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk beneath elevated glass pedestrian bridges with cyan neon lighting. Palm trees line the right side while digital billboards cover the left building wall. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the adjacent road as pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial market and crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered walkway section and approaching the open intersection with ALL FOODS market visible
crossing the street at the marked crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, navigating through pedestrians, and crossing the street toward the orange ALL FOODS market sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red mohawk and purple jacket walking toward the crosswalk
yellow taxi cab stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: commercial market with large orange signage and yellow lettering visible on the building facade
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit intersection as the character approaches the ALL FOODS market. The character crosses the street at the marked crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians including one with a red mohawk. A yellow taxi waits at the intersection while the glass pedestrian bridges recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with large digital billboards and building entrance stairs

events.description: entering the next city block featuring the large SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2 billboard on the right
entering a shaded area under a building overhang reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past groups of pedestrians and ascending stairs visible on the right building

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2 advertisement with green and yellow graphics
concrete stairs with yellow safety stripes leading up to a building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the next block where a massive SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2 billboard dominates the right side of the street. The sidewalk passes by a building entrance with stairs and becomes partially shaded by an overhang. Groups of pedestrians walk ahead as the character maintains a steady pace through the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with high-rise optical advertisements and dark glass facades

events.description: passing into a section with darker building architecture and the KIROSHI OPTICALS advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking through a more shaded urban corridor with large digital advertisements, maintaining steady forward movement

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement for KIROSHI OPTICALS displaying futuristic eyewear
dark tinted glass building facade with reflective surfaces and minimal neon accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking past the KIROSHI OPTICALS billboard on a darker section of the street. The building facades here feature more glass and darker materials compared to the earlier bright commercial area. Pedestrians continue walking ahead as the street extends toward distant skyscrapers under the clear midday sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk district that shifts from neon-lit walkways into a bright commercial intersection and finally toward a more shadowed urban corridor. It begins with the character walking along a sidewalk beneath cyan-lit glass pedestrian bridges, flanked by palm trees and digital billboards. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a sunlit intersection where they cross the street past a yellow taxi and an ALL FOODS market, leaving the elevated bridges behind. The path then leads along a commercial block dominated by a massive SWEET CLEAN SPEED 2 billboard, passing through alternating patches of bright light and building shade. Finally, the environment transitions into a darker section of the street characterized by glass facades and a KIROSHI OPTICALS sign, as the character continues toward distant skyscrapers under a clear midday sky.
